---
title: Themes
description: Customize zlaunch appearance
---

zlaunch includes 15 bundled themes and supports custom themes.

## Setting a Theme

<Tabs items={['Config File', 'CLI', 'In Launcher']}>
<Tab value="Config File">

```toml
theme = "one-dark"
```

</Tab>
<Tab value="CLI">

```bash
# Show current theme
zlaunch theme

# List available themes
zlaunch theme list

# Set theme
zlaunch theme set dracula
```

</Tab>
<Tab value="In Launcher">

Open the themes mode to switch interactively:

```bash
zlaunch show --modes themes
```

Or in combined mode, search for theme names.

</Tab>
</Tabs>

## Theme Location

Custom themes are stored in:

```
~/.config/zlaunch/themes/
```

Create this directory and add `.toml` files for your custom themes.

<Callout type="info">
Themes are hot-reloaded when files change.
</Callout>

<Cards>
  <Card title="Bundled Themes" href="/docs/themes/bundled">
    15 included color schemes
  </Card>
  <Card title="Custom Themes" href="/docs/themes/custom">
    Create your own theme
  </Card>
</Cards>
